categories.name: Makeup
categories.nameLo: ເຄື່ອງສຳອາງ

categories.name: Accessories
categories.nameLo: ເຄື່ອງປະດັບ

categories.name: Home & Living
categories.nameLo: ຂອງໃຊ້ໃນເຮືອນ

products.name: Gentle Foaming Cleanser
products.nameLo: ໂຟມລ້າງໜ້າ ອ່ອນໂຍນ
products.description: A mild, sulfate-free foaming cleanser that removes makeup and impurities without stripping your skin. Leaves your face soft, calm and refreshed.
products.descriptionLo: ໂຟມລ້າງໜ້າ ອ່ອນໂຍນ ບໍ່ມີຊັลເฟด ຊ່ວຍລ້າງເຄື່ອງສຳອາງ ແລະ ສິ່ງເປື້ອນ ໂດຍບໍ່ເຮັດໃຫ້ຜິວແຫ້ງ.

products.name: Hydra Boost Serum
products.nameLo: ເຊລັ່ມ ເພີ່ມຄວາມຊຸ່ມຊື່ນ
products.description: Lightweight hyaluronic acid serum that delivers deep, long-lasting hydration for plump, dewy skin. Absorbs instantly with no sticky feel.
products.descriptionLo: ເຊລັ່ມ ໄຮຢາລູຣອນິກ ບາງເບົາ ເພີ່ມຄວາມຊຸ່ມຊື່ນ ໃຫ້ຜິວອີ່ມນ້ຳ ຊຶມໄວ ບໍ່ໜຽວ.

products.name: Vitamin C Brightening Toner
products.nameLo: ໂທເນີ ວິຕາມິນຊີ
products.description: A refreshing toner infused with vitamin C to brighten dull skin, even out tone and prep your face for the rest of your routine.
products.descriptionLo: ໂທເນີ ຜະສົມວິຕາມິນຊີ ຊ່ວຍໃຫ້ຜິວກະຈ່າງໃສ ສີຜິວສະໝ່ຳສະເໝີ.

products.name: SPF50 Daily Sunscreen
products.nameLo: ຄີມກັນແດດ SPF50
products.description: Non-greasy broad-spectrum SPF50+ sunscreen with a soft matte finish. Sits beautifully under makeup and protects all day.
products.descriptionLo: ຄີມກັນແດດ SPF50+ ບໍ່ມັນ ເນື້ອບາງ ທາໃຕ້ເຄື່ອງສຳອາງໄດ້ ປົກປ້ອງໝົດມື້.

products.name: Velvet Matte Lipstick
products.nameLo: ລິບສະຕິກ ແມັດ
products.description: Richly pigmented velvet matte lipstick that glides on smooth and stays comfortable for hours. Available in everyday rosy tones.
products.descriptionLo: ລິບສະຕິກ ເນື້ອແມັດ ສີແໜ້ນ ທາງ່າຍ ຕິດທົນ ບໍ່ແຫ້ງປາກ.

products.name: Everyday Cushion Foundation
products.nameLo: ຄຸດຊັ້ນ ຮອງພື້ນ
products.description: A dewy cushion foundation with buildable medium coverage and SPF. Refillable and perfect for touch-ups on the go.
products.descriptionLo: ຄຸດຊັ້ນຮອງພື້ນ ເນື້ອບາງ ປົກປິດພໍດີ ມີ SPF ຕື່ມໄສ້ໄດ້ ພົກພາສະດວກ.

products.name: Long-wear Volume Mascara
products.nameLo: ມາສຄາຣາ ເພີ່ມຄວາມໜາ
products.description: Smudge-proof mascara that lifts, separates and adds dramatic volume. Holds curl all day and removes easily with warm water.
products.descriptionLo: ມາສຄາຣາ ກັນເລ່ອນ ເພີ່ມຄວາມໜາ ງອນທົນ ລ້າງອອກງ່າຍດ້ວຍນ້ຳອຸ່ນ.

products.name: Soft Glow Blush Palette
products.nameLo: ພາເລັດ ປັດແກ້ມ
products.description: A six-shade blush palette blending matte and shimmer tones for a natural flush. Silky, blendable and long lasting.
products.descriptionLo: ພາເລັດ ปัดแก้ม 6 ໂທນສີ ທັງແມັດ ແລະ ຊິມເມີ ໃຫ້ແກ້ມມີເລືອດฝาด ທຳມະຊາດ.

products.name: Passport & Card Organizer
products.nameLo: ກະເປົ່າເກັບ Passport & ບັດ
products.description: A slim travel organizer that keeps your passport, boarding passes and cards neat in one place. Durable water-resistant fabric.
products.descriptionLo: ກະເປົ່າເກັບ Passport, ບັດຂຶ້ນຍົນ ແລະ ບັດຕ່າງໆ ໃຫ້ເປັນລະບຽບ ຜ້າກັນນ້ຳ ທົນທານ.

products.name: Mini Crossbody Bag
products.nameLo: ກະເປົ່າສະພາຍ ນ້ອຍ
products.description: A cute, compact crossbody bag with an adjustable strap. Just the right size for your phone, cards and daily essentials.
products.descriptionLo: ກະເປົ່າສະພາຍ ນ້ອຍ ໜ້າຮັກ ສາຍปรับได้ ใส่ໂທລະສັບ ບັດ ແລະ ຂອງໃຊ້ປະຈຳວັນ.

products.name: Travel Pouch Set (10 pcs)
products.nameLo: ເຊັດຈັດກະເປົ່າ 10 ຊິ້ນ
products.description: A ten-piece packing set to organize clothes, cables and toiletries. Keeps your luggage tidy and easy to unpack.
products.descriptionLo: ເຊັດຈັດລະບຽບກະເປົ່າ 10 ຊິ້ນ ຈັດเสื้อผ้າ ສາຍชาร์จ ແລະ ຂອງໃຊ້ ให้ເປັນລະບຽບ.

products.name: Slim Card Holder Wallet
products.nameLo: ກະເປົ່າໃສ່ບັດ
products.description: A minimalist card holder in soft vegan leather. Holds up to eight cards plus cash in a slim, pocket-friendly design.
products.descriptionLo: ກະເປົ່າໃສ່ບັດ ໜັງ vegan ນຸ່ม ໃສ່ໄດ້ 8 ບັດ ພ້ອມເງິນສົດ ບາງ ພົກง่าย.

products.name: Cute Sticker Pack
products.nameLo: ສະຕິກເກີ ໜ້າຮັກ
products.description: A set of 30 waterproof vinyl stickers featuring bunnies, clovers and pastel doodles. Perfect for laptops, planners and phone cases.
products.descriptionLo: ຊຸດສະຕິກເກີ 30 ອັນ ກັນນ້ຳ ລາຍกระต่าย ແລະ ลายน่ารัก ຕິດແລັບທັອບ ปฏิทิน ແລະ ເคสໂທລະສັບ.

products.name: A5 Grid Notebook
products.nameLo: ປຶ້ມບັນທຶກ A5
products.description: A5 dot-grid notebook with 160 thick, bleed-resistant pages and a soft-touch cover. Lies flat for comfortable writing.
products.descriptionLo: ປຶ້ມບັນທຶກ A5 ລາຍจุด 160 ໜ້າ ກະดาษໜา ปกนุ่ม ກາງออกราบ ຂຽນສະดวก.

products.name: Gel Pen Set (6 colors)
products.nameLo: ປາກກາເຈວ ຊຸດ 6 ດ້າມ
products.description: Six smooth-writing 0.5mm gel pens in soft pastel colors. Quick-drying ink that's great for journaling and note-taking.
products.descriptionLo: ປາກກາເຈວ 6 ດ້າມ 0.5mm ສີພาสเทล ຂຽນລື่น ໝึกແห้งไว เหมาะกับการจดโน้ต.

products.name: Washi Tape Trio
products.nameLo: ເທັບ Washi 3 ມ້ວນ
products.description: Three rolls of decorative washi tape in coordinating patterns. Tear by hand and reposition easily — no scissors needed.
products.descriptionLo: ເທັບ Washi 3 ມ້ວນ ລວດลาย เข้าชุด ฉีกมือได้ ติดใหม่ได้ ไม่ต้องใช้กรรไกร.

products.name: Pearl Hair Clip Set
products.nameLo: ກິบຕິດຜົມ ໄຂ່ມຸກ
products.description: A set of four elegant faux-pearl hair clips that instantly elevate any hairstyle. Strong grip that won't slip.
products.descriptionLo: ຊຸດກິບຕິດຜົມ ໄຂ่มุกเทียม 4 ອັນ เพิ่มความสวยให้ทรงผม จับແໜ້ນ ບໍ່ເລື່ອນ.

products.name: Minimalist Layered Necklace
products.nameLo: ສ້ອຍຄໍ Minimal
products.description: A dainty gold-tone layered necklace that pairs with everything. Tarnish-resistant and hypoallergenic for daily wear.
products.descriptionLo: ສ້ອຍຄໍ ໂทนทอง แบบซ้อนชั้น ใส่กับอะไรก็สวย ไม่แพ้ผิว ใส่ได้ทุกวัน.

products.name: Satin Scrunchie Pack (5)
products.nameLo: ຢາງມັດຜົມ 5 ອັນ
products.description: Five soft satin scrunchies in muted tones that hold your hair gently without creases or breakage.
products.descriptionLo: ຢາງມັດຜົມ ຊາຕິນ 5 ອັນ ໂทนสีนุ่ม รัดผมได้เบามือ ไม่ทำให้ผมหักงอ.

products.name: Acrylic Statement Earrings
products.nameLo: ຕຸ້ມຫູ Acrylic
products.description: Lightweight acrylic statement earrings in a translucent marbled finish. Bold yet comfortable for all-day wear.
products.descriptionLo: ຕຸ້ມຫູ acrylic ນ້ຳໜັກເບົາ ลายหินอ่อนโปร่งแสง โดดเด่น ใส่สบายทั้งวัน.

products.name: Miniature Dollhouse DIY Kit
products.nameLo: ຊຸດ DIY ບ້ານຕຸກກະຕາ
products.description: A detailed DIY miniature dollhouse kit with LED lights, furniture and dust cover. A relaxing weekend build and lovely display piece.
products.descriptionLo: ຊຸດ DIY ບ້ານຕຸກກະຕາ ພ້ອມໄຟ LED ເຟີນິເຈີ ແລະ ฝาครอบกันฝุ่น ประกอบเพลิน ตั้งโชว์สวย.

products.name: Aroma Scented Candle
products.nameLo: ທຽນຫອມ
products.description: A hand-poured soy wax candle with a calming lavender-vanilla scent and around 40 hours of clean, even burn time.
products.descriptionLo: ທຽນຫອມ ຂີ້ผึ้งถั่วเหลือง กลิ่นลาเวนเดอร์-วานิลลา หอมผ่อนคลาย ໄໝ້ໄດ້ ~40 ຊົ່ວໂມງ.

products.name: Matte Ceramic Mug
products.nameLo: ຈອກເຊລາມິກ
products.description: A 350ml matte-glazed ceramic mug with a comfortable handle. Microwave and dishwasher safe for everyday coffee and tea.
products.descriptionLo: ຈອກເຊລາມິກ 350ml ผิวด้าน จับถนัดมือ เข้าไมโครเวฟ ແລະ เครื่องล้างจานได้.

products.name: Plush Bunny Cushion
products.nameLo: ໝອນ ກະຕ່າຍ
products.description: An irresistibly soft plush bunny cushion that doubles as decor and a nap buddy. Machine washable removable cover.
products.descriptionLo: ໝອນ ตุ๊กตากระต่าย นุ่มน่ากอด ใช้ตกแต่งและหนุนนอนได้ ปลอกถอดซักได้.
